name: Bad Name
description: Broken Claude Code plugin fixture for cc-plugin-eval evaluator tests. Path is set to a missing directory and ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} appears in this metadata field intentionally so cc-plugin-eval emits CC110.
